name: v26.1.2-1
body:
## What's Changed
- Update to 26.1.2
- Major refactor of `MeteoristStarscript` - added new functions `is_falling` and `would_take_damage`; improved fall damage/distance calculations with proper caching and edge-case handling
- Baritone & Minescript updated to versions 26.1 and 5.0b11 respectively
- `AutoSleep` logic simplified

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Zgoly/Meteorist/compare/v1.21.11-2...v26.1.2-1
